name: Sarah M.
text: Premier Paws has been incredible with our dog Bella. She gets so excited when the walker arrives! The daily photo updates give us so much peace of mind while we're at work.

name: James & Tara K.
text: We've tried several pet sitting services and Premier Paws is by far the best. Professional, reliable, and they clearly genuinely love animals. Cooper is always happy and well-cared for.

name: Maria L.
text: I was nervous about leaving my cats for a week but the team put me completely at ease. They sent photos every day and my cats were relaxed and happy when I got home.

name: David R.
text: Max can be a handful but Premier Paws handled him with confidence and care from day one. The free meet and greet before booking was a great touch — highly recommend.

name: Jennifer H.
text: The puppy care service is a lifesaver. Luna gets the extra potty breaks and attention she needs during the day, and I can tell she's being well-socialized. Worth every penny.
